3125920.name: Hope & Elpis
3125920.description:
Hope & Elpis is a transforming roguelike deck-builder game that follows the journey of Hope, a novice mage, and Elpis, an ancient mage. Seal away enemies within the space of the mysterious ancient artifact, the 'Orb'. As you seal away evil spirits, the Orb provides powerful magic in return.


Transform into an ancient mage!!
Use Hope's magic and Elpis' Orb magic in the right place at the right time. Elpis' powerful Orb magic comes with a price.


Tile-based battles
Outmaneuver your foes, unleash area-of-effect spells, and sometimes, the best defense is a well-timed offense.


The power of various Orbs
Strategically choose the power of the Orbs to be released. Hope & Elpis can select and combine three powers to use powerful magic.
